controlled_motion_instruction: Continuous figure-eight motion at a comfortable steady pace without lifting the mouse.

controlled_variables.selected_device_policy: operator moves only SIGNO; select most active native raw device

supersession_reason: Unity InputEventPtr.time was frame-batched despite unmerged deltas; Pilot v3 timestamps WM_INPUT receipt on a dedicated message pump using QPC.
approval_basis: Instrumentation correction preserves the project-owner-approved A-H physical capture contract.
